description_long: This is a hardcover book with a green cover adorned with ornate gold borders and a central floral illustration featuring pink and red flowers with green leaves. The front cover is richly decorated, giving the book a vintage or classic appearance. The spine and back cover are also green, bordered with gold detailing, and the back contains a block of text and a barcode. The book appears thick, with cream-colored pages visible along the sides. The cover art is intricate, with a ribbon-like banner integrated into the floral design. The overall condition and design suggest it is a well-crafted, possibly collectible edition.
description: A thick, green hardcover book with ornate gold borders and a detailed floral illustration on the front cover. Cream-colored pages and decorative elements give it a classic, vintage look.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showcasing the ornate gold border and central floral illustration with a ribbon banner.
description_view_1: The book is angled to show both the front cover and the thick, cream-colored pages along the side.
description_view_2: The back cover is visible, featuring gold borders, a block of text, and a barcode, with the spine and page edges also in view.
description_view_3: The book is seen from the top-back angle, highlighting the spine, back cover, and the thickness of the pages.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a detailed, vintage-style illustration of pink and red flowers with green leaves, arranged in a bouquet. The artwork is framed by ornate gold borders and includes a ribbon-like banner woven through the floral arrangement. The style is classic and decorative, evoking a sense of elegance and tradition.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is green with gold decorative borders and likely contains gold text running vertically, matching the ornate style of the front cover. The design is classic and elegant, consistent with the overall vintage appearance.
